title: Input schema of the GitHub Repo Digest Scraper

startUrls.title: GitHub Repository URLs
startUrls.description: URLs of GitHub repositories to analyze (e.g., https://github.com/owner/repo).

maxFilesToProcess.title: Max Files to Process
maxFilesToProcess.description: Maximum number of source files to include in digest.

excludePatterns.title: Exclude Patterns
excludePatterns.description: Path patterns to exclude (node_modules, .git, dist, build, etc)

includeDocumentation.title: Include Documentation
includeDocumentation.description: Include README, docs, and markdown files.

includeTests.title: Include Test Files
includeTests.description: Whether to include test and spec files.

generateCodeTree.title: Generate Directory Tree
generateCodeTree.description: Create a visual directory structure overview.

extractSummaries.title: Extract File Summaries
extractSummaries.description: Generate brief summaries for each file using heuristics.

includeStatistics.title: Include Code Statistics
includeStatistics.description: Calculate lines of code, complexity metrics, etc.

maxFileSizeKB.title: Max File Size (KB)
maxFileSizeKB.description: Skip files larger than this size to save context.

compressOutput.title: Compress Output
compressOutput.description: Compress digest to save space and reduce token usage.
